monitor_the_situation.title: Israeli Air Force Kills Two Hamas Commanders in Gaza Strip
— S3 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 5h ago. IAF conducted two airstrikes in northern Gaza, killing two Hamas commanders in separate strikes.
Israel Strikes Two Towns in Southern Lebanon
— S3 · Conflict · Nabatieh Governorate, Lebanon · 6h ago. Israeli drone strikes hit Kfar Rumman and Nabatieh al-Fawqa in Nabatieh governorate, southern Lebanon. No immediate casualty reports.
Israeli Drone Strike Hits Gaza Hospital Courtyard
— S3 · Conflict · Beit Lahia, Gaza Strip, Palestine · 6h ago. Israeli drone strike on Kamal Adwan Hospital courtyard in northern Gaza wounds medical staff, per Palestinian Health Ministry.
